briefdescription.para: 0: PPK1/2 registers refer to PPK1/2 HASH; 1: PPK1/2 registers refer to PUF_SYN HASH
RMA Disable, 0: Default; 1: Disables RMA when set.
RMA Enable, 0: Default; 1: Enables RMA when set.
DFT Disable, 0: Default; 1: Disables DFT when set.
Lockdown, 0: Default; 1: Enables lockdown when set.
PUF TestMode2 Disable, 0: Default; 1: Disable the PUF TestMode2 permanently.
AES Read/Write Lock, 0: Default; 1: Locks writing to AES KEY and disables CRC checks on AES boot key.
JTAG Disable, 0: Default; 1: Disable all JTAG instructions when set.
AES Disable, 0: Default; 1: Disable the AES engine.
Scan clear enable, 0: Default; 1: Enables scan clear when set.
PPK0 Lock, 0: Default (No protection from writes); 1: Locks writing to PPK0 eFuses.
PPK0 Invalid, 0: Default (No protection from writes); 1: Marks PPK0 as invalid.
PPK1 Lock, 0: Default (No protection from writes); 1: Locks writing to PPK1 eFuses.
PPK1 Invalid, 0: Default (No protection from writes); 1: Marks PPK1 as invalid.
PPK2 Lock, 0: Default (No protection from writes); 1: Locks writing to PPK2 eFuses.
PPK2 Invalid, 0: Default (No protection from writes); 1: Marks PPK2 as invalid.
User Write Lock, 0: Default (User eFuses writable); 1: Locks writing to User eFuses.
JTAG Error Out Disable, 0: Default; 1: Disables JTAG error out when set.
CRC Enable, 0: Default; 1: Enables CRC when set.
RMA Disable using CRC, 0: Default; 1: Disables RMA when set.
RMA Enable using CRC, 0: Default; 1: Enables RMA when set.
AES disable.
JTAG error output disable.
JTAG disable.
Hardware test bits disable.
PPK0 write lock.
PPK1 write lock.
PPK2 write lock.
AES CRC lock.
AES write lock.
User key 0 CRC lock.
User key 0 write lock.
User key 1 CRC lock.
User key 1 write lock.
Secure debug disable.
Secure lock debug disable.
PMC secure control enable.
Boot environment write lock.
Register initialization disable.
eFuse security control bits
